title: "ERROR: Assert `port.addr[j] == State::S0' failed" when in Verific mode

features.name: multi_port_memory_partial_write_with_separate_enables
features.description: Code should include a multi-port memory with partial writes using separate enable signals for different bit slices

features.name: memory_with_packed_unpacked_indexing
features.description: Code should include memory access using both packed bit-select and unpacked address indexing in a single expression
